name: New Mexico Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to New Mexico - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
New Mexico Board of Nursing
6301 Indian School Road NE, Suite 710
Albuquerque, NM 87110

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

mainEntity.name: How much does New Mexico CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no application fee for CNA endorsement in New Mexico. However, background check fees may apply.
No, fingerprints are generally not required for CNA endorsement in New Mexico.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to New Mexico?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in New Mexico while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
